headline: Assessing Williams-Sonoma (WSM) Valuation As AI Efficiencies And Premium Product Gains Draw Fresh Attention
summary: Williams-Sonoma (WSM) is attracting fresh attention as recent commentary points to expanding retail productivity, broad-based strength across furniture and non-furniture categories, and greater use of AI tools in customer service and supply-chain operations. See our latest analysis for Williams-Sonoma.
